studyName: Microdissected Pancreatic Cancer Whole Exome Sequencing

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, tumor status of sample, and sequencing center of participants with or without malignant granular cell tumor and involved in the "Whole-Genome Sequencing (WGS) of a Malignant Granular Vell Tumor (GCT) with Metabolic Response to Pazopanib" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, and affection status of participants with or without malignant granular cell tumor and involved in the "Whole-Genome Sequencing (WGS) of a Malignant Granular Vell Tumor (GCT) with Metabolic Response to Pazopanib" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with pancreatic cancer and involved in the "Microdissected Pancreatic Cancer Whole Exome Sequencing" project.
